# Load files
import json, sys, os, re
qpath = '/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json'
hpath = '/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json'
print(os.path.exists(qpath), os.path.exists(hpath))
with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    q = json.load(f)
len(q) if isinstance(q, list) else type(q)

target = "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَيْهِمُ مُوسَى بِآيَاتِنَا أَنْ أَخْرِجْ قَوْمَكَ مِنَ الظُّلُمَاتِ إِلَى النُّورِ وَذَكِّرْهُمْ بِأَيَّامِ اللَّهِ"
# search exact match
matches = [entry for entry in q if entry['ayah_text'] == target]
len(matches), matches[:2]

# Normalization functions
import re
import unicodedata
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

def normalize_ar(s):
    # remove tatweel
    s = re.sub(r'ـ', '', s)
    # remove tashkeel (diacritics): ARABIC DIACRITICS range: \u0610-\u061A, \u064B-\u065F, \u0670, \u06D6-\u06ED
    s = re.sub(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED\u08D3-\u08E1]', '', s)
    # normalize hamza: replace ءأإآ with ا or maybe with ء? Developer said unify hamza. Use bare ا for beginning.
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ء','ء')  # keep ء maybe
    # remove punctuation and tatweel Latin etc
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\u0621-\u064A\s]', '', s)  # keep Arabic letters and underscore and whitespace; \w includes underscore & digits; but digits might be english
    # collapse whitespace
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    # lower-case not needed
    return s

target_norm = normalize_ar(target)
# Let's search
best = []
for entry in q:
    cand = entry['ayah_text']
    cand_norm = normalize_ar(cand)
    # compute sequence matcher ratio
    ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, target_norm, cand_norm).ratio()
    if ratio > 0.7:
        best.append((ratio, entry['surah_id'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'], cand_norm))
best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x:-x[0])[:20]
best_sorted[:10], len(best_sorted)

from collections import Counter

cand = "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ بِآيَاتِنَا أَنْ أَخْرِجْ قَوْمَكَ مِنَ الظُّلُمَاتِ إِلَى النُّورِ وَذَكِّرْهُمْ بِأَيَّامِ اللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِكُلِّ صَبَّارٍ شَكُورٍ"
cand_norm = normalize_ar(cand)
target_norm = normalize_ar(target)
cand_norm, target_norm

toks_target = target_norm.split()
toks_cand = cand_norm.split()
set_target = set(toks_target)
set_cand = set(toks_cand)
intersection = set_target & set_cand
precision = len(intersection)/len(set_cand)
recall = len(intersection)/len(set_target)
f1 = 0 if (precision+recall)==0 else 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
len(set_target), len(set_cand), len(intersection), precision, recall, f1

# search for normalized pattern 'ارسَلنا اليهم موسى' in DB normalized texts
pattern = normalize_ar("أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَيْهِمْ مُوسَىٰ")
found = []
for entry in q:
    if pattern in normalize_ar(entry['ayah_text']):
        found.append(entry)
len(found), found[:3]

with open(hpath,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    h = json.load(f)
# check type
type(h), len(h)

target_norm = normalize_ar(target)
best_h = []
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
for entry in h:
    # hadith text may be in 'hadithTxt' or 'Matn'
    txt = entry.get('hadithTxt') or entry.get('Matn') or ''
    if not txt:
        continue
    txt_norm = normalize_ar(txt)
    ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, target_norm, txt_norm).ratio()
    if ratio>0.7:
        best_h.append((ratio, txt))
best_h_sorted = sorted(best_h, key=lambda x:-x[0])[:10]
best_h_sorted[:5], len(best_h_sorted)

content.text: {"correction":"وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ بِآيَاتِنَا أَنْ أَخْرِجْ قَوْمَكَ مِنَ الظُّلُمَاتِ إِلَى النُّورِ وَذَكِّرْهُمْ بِأَيَّامِ اللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِكُلِّ صَبَّارٍ شَكُورٍ"}
